name: D3 Ch12 — Xil City Encounters, Back Street and Alley (1-in-6)
description: City encounter table for Xil's Lower Warrens, service tunnels, and areas near slave pens, Chapter 12 of D3. Encounter frequency: 1 in 6 per new district entered. Roll 1d20 on this table. Urban predator sub-roll: 1d4 (1=cloaker HD 6 hp 42 XPV 650, 2=intellect devourer HD 6 hp 42 XPV 2,600, 3=shadows 2-5 HD 3+3 XPV 220 each, 4=wight HD 4+3 XPV 500).

results.text: Quaggoth patrol (4–6; HD 3+3, hp 22, AC 5, #AT 2, Dmg 2–8/2–8; unsupervised, hostile to strangers; XPV 100 each)
Drow thieves (3–8 rogues Level 2–4; mugging a target or casing a nearby estate; will flee if outmatched)
Xorn (1; digging through a wall; HD 7+7, hp 56, AC -2; neutral, highly interested in gems and metals — will trade information for them)
Dark creeper gang (4–8; HD 1+1, hp 7, AC 4, light-extinguishing ability, dagger throwers; XPV 55 each)
Ghoul pack (3–8; escaped from Draethi holding; HD 2, hp 14, AC 6, paralytic claw and bite — save vs. paralysis; XPV 65 each)
Drow assassin (1; Thalmyr Silent Blade, Level 5–7 Assassin; shadowing a named noble or fulfilling a contract; will not engage unless detected)
Bugbear gang (4–8; HD 3+1, hp 18, AC 5; off-duty, looking for trouble or settling a debt; bribable with food or coin; XPV 135 each)
Escaped slave (1; surface race — human, gnome, dwarf, or halfling; lost and desperate; may have useful intel about slave pen layout in exchange for help)
Drow scholar (1; House Vorryn scribe Level 3; carrying rare documents or census records; neutral and bribable — information for coin)
Underground fence (1–2 drow, Velouryn Syndicate contacts; buying stolen goods at 20% market value; will answer questions about the Bazaar for a cut)
House spy (1 Thalmyr Silent Blade agent; buying or selling information; will vanish into a pre-prepared bolt-hole if directly confronted)
Street priest of Lolth (1 Level 4 cleric; Zhaelor-aligned; collecting tithes by threat; accompanied by 2 quaggoth enforcers)
Urban predator — roll 1d4: 1=cloaker (HD 6 hp 42 AC 5 XPV 650), 2=intellect devourer (HD 6 hp 42 AC 3 XPV 2,600), 3=shadows 2–5 (HD 3+3 XPV 220 each), 4=wight (HD 4+3 hp 30 XPV 500)
Mage apprentice (1–2; House Veythrae Level 3 wizard; lost or testing a new spell in private; may panic and cast offensively if startled)
Drow debtor chase (1 drow debtor running, 2–4 Velouryn Syndicate enforcers HD 3+3 pursuing; will ignore bystanders unless they interfere)
Beggar/houseless drow (1–3; desperate and information-hungry; know secret passages through the Lower Warrens and have overheard house business — for the right price)
Surface humanoid slave loose (1; gnome, dwarf, or halfling; 4 drow searchers HD 3+3 are 1 turn behind; slave is panicked and hiding)
Secret Thalmyr cell meeting (4–6 Silent Blade members Level 3–5; cell will immediately scatter and attack anyone who discovered them; each knows one escape route)
Rakshasa in disguise (1; HD 7, hp 52, AC -4, immune to spells below 8th level; posing as a minor Velouryn merchant; has a separate agenda entirely)
Shadowdemon (1; escaped from Veythrae summoning pit; HD 7, hp 42, AC 0, immune to fire and cold, half damage from electricity; confused and violent — it is lost)
